seoDescription: Boutique coffee catering by Palm & Light Coffee for weddings, corporate gatherings, and private events.

hero.headline: Bring Palm & Light to the table.
hero.body: Thoughtful coffee, warm hospitality, and sunlit presentation for gatherings of all kinds.

intro.headline: For celebrations, gatherings, and everything in between.
intro.body: From intimate brunches to weddings, creative productions, and corporate events, we bring the Palm & Light experience to you with care and intention.

items.title: Craft Coffee
items.description: Espresso, batch brew, cold brew, matcha, and seasonal drinks.

items.title: Pastries & Light Bites
items.description: Freshly prepared baked goods and simple, thoughtful pairings.

items.title: Full Service
items.description: Setup, service, and a calm, polished presence throughout your event.

form.headline: Inquire
form.body: Tell us a bit about your event and we'll follow up with availability and details.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please email us directly at catering@palmandlight.co.

offline.headline: Prefer to plan offline?
offline.body: Download our catering request form, fill it out at your pace, and send it to us when you're ready.

images.heroAlt: Coffee and pastry catering setup in natural light
images.experienceAlt: Outdoor catering setup with espresso machine, florals, and citrus
images.formAlt: Elegant pastries and drinks prepared for service
images.offlineAlt: Palm & Light catering details and stationery
images.optionalAlt: Close-up of coffee and pastries for catering
